message:
feat: add pyproject.toml parser and support

- Add TOML parser (packages/pkg/src/parse/toml.zig)
- Add pyproject.toml parser with PEP 621 support
- Parse [project] dependencies and [project.optional-dependencies]
- Parse [build-system] requirements and backend
- Parse [tool.metal0] config section
- Update CLI: `metal0 install` auto-reads pyproject.toml
- Add `-e/--extra` flag for optional dependencies
